text.title: Vision API
text.summary: Image understanding via URL or base64 encoding; detail level controls token cost (85–1105 tokens per image); max 20MB, formats PNG/JPEG/GIF/WebP.

list.item: low: 85 tokens — quick overview, thumbnails, no fine details
high: 85-1105+ tokens — OCR, detailed analysis, full resolution
auto: model decides based on image content

rule.statement: Profile image token cost before shipping multimodal pipelines; high-detail images add up to 1105 tokens each, multiplying costs on batches.
rule.rationale: Vision token cost is proportional to image size and detail level; untracked, it dominates pipeline cost for image-heavy workloads.

list.item: Vision limitations: struggles with rotated text, small text, spatial reasoning, animated GIFs
Max 20 images per message; no video (extract frames manually)
Supported formats: PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP
